operator_trigger: Approved recovery pass after monolithic JOC UI failure investigation.
problem_statement: JOC/Helixion/dAimon UI work was allowed to proceed through general Helixion orchestration and generic frontend implementation instead of the UI Frontend Excellence domain and JOC work-surface packet.

root_cause.routing_gap: The UI Frontend Excellence domain and joc_work_surface_ui_packet existed in candidate current context but were not mounted as an active skill or context package in the accepted Codex solo routing path.
root_cause.execution_gap: The implementation treated JOC as a visual theme and data inventory target instead of a binding shell/page/drawer/timeline architecture.
root_cause.quality_gate_gap: Visual proof and JOC canon settlement were not required before UI implementation claims.

changes.change: Added UI_FRONTEND_TERMS and routed JOC UI, cockpit shell, drawers, inspectors, bottom timeline, monolith, extension UI, dAimon companion, Docs/Packages, and visual proof language to ui-frontend-excellence before generic recovery/orchestration selection.

Added ui-frontend-excellence specialist skill with required UI canon context mount, joc_work_surface_ui_packet template activation, non-monolith proof contract, and visual-proof-before-acceptance requirement.
Added ui_frontend_excellence_package and included the UI protocol/domain/template/packet in route-depth refs so future UI work can mount the correct canon before implementation.

quarantine.meaning: These UI implementation checkpoints are candidate/provisional inventory only. They are not accepted JOC product architecture and must not be treated as settled UI canon.
quarantine.allowed_reuse: Data surfaces, view-model ideas, and evidence references may be reused only after explicit mapping into TOP_BAR, LEFT_ICON_RAIL, LEFT_DRAWER, MAIN_WORK_SURFACE, RIGHT_INSPECTOR, RIGHT_ICON_RAIL, and BOTTOM_TIMELINE.

hard_gates: No new JOC/Helixion UI implementation without ui-frontend-excellence activation.
No large scrolling dashboard or panel wall as accepted architecture.
No React/Vite/product route work before shell/page/drawer/timeline contract is settled for the target surface.
No visual-quality or accepted-state claim without explicit visual proof or an unrun proof note.
No silent browser control, production mutation, credentials, purchases, or destructive actions.
non_claims: This receipt does not fix or rebuild the UI.
This receipt does not validate the route patches with tests.
This receipt does not claim the 8765 cockpit and 8788 development shell are unified.
This receipt does not accept C-078 through C-085 as final product UI.
